data.title: Only 20% of organizations are prepared for Automation and AI, according to GBTEC's research. Process excellence is crucial.
data.description: In Bochum, Germany, a recent report by GBTEC highlights that despite significant investments in AI and automation by organizations, many lack the operational maturity required for success. The report, titled The 2025 Process Excellence and AI-Readiness Report, underscores the importance of process excellence in facilitating effective business transformation through automation and AI. Based on input from 600 senior business and operations leaders in ANZ, Europe, and North America, the report sheds light on the critical role of process optimization in ensuring successful integration of technologies.

data.title: Lotus Tech announces unaudited financial results for Q2 and H1 2025. Leading luxury mobility provider.
data.description: Lotus Technology Inc., a prominent global provider of intelligent and luxury mobility services, revealed its unaudited financial outcomes for the second quarter and first half of 2025. The company shared this information on August 29, 2025, specifying the financial data for the period ending on June 30, 2025.

data.title: Flight canceled by United, passenger sold a new seat for $648 on the same flight after last-minute notice in Venice.
data.description: After returning from Venice, a traveler was unexpectedly informed that the last segment of his journey was canceled. Subsequently, he paid $648 to secure a new seat on the same flight.

data.title: US ETFs driving up to $10B daily Bitcoin trades, becoming significant spot trading source, boosting institutional adoption.
data.description: Bitcoin exchange-traded funds (ETFs) in the US are currently facilitating approximately $10 billion in daily trades, which is comparable to prominent exchanges. This highlights the significance of these ETFs in the increasing institutional acceptance of cryptocurrency.

data.title: Oulu, Finland to unveil its European Capital of Culture 2026 program on Sept 4, live stream across Europe.
data.description: In Oulu, Finland, the city has been selected as the European Capital of Culture for the year 2026. The announcement was made, and the full program for the cultural festivities will be broadcasted live throughout Europe on the 4th of September.
